details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory is missing; memory_bank/ has key docs; .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs; reports/audit/ exists.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python code (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). Additionally, scripts referencing moltbot found: scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. These are code/config files, not audit/docs documenting removal.
